tool_calls:
set -e
pwd
ls -ld / /lib /data || true
id
set -e
printf 'HOME=%s\n' "$HOME"
for p in / /lib /data /home /home/eval /home/user; do
  if [[ -e "$p" ]]; then echo "EXISTS $p"; else echo "MISSING $p"; fi
done
set -e
if [[ -f /data/sample.txt ]]; then echo 'sample exists'; wc -l < /data/sample.txt; wc -c < /data/sample.txt; else echo 'sample missing'; fi
set -e
mkdir -p /lib
cat > /lib/utils.sh <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash

to_upper() {
  tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]'
}

count_lines() {
  local file="$1"
  wc -l < "$file"
}

file_size() {
  local file="$1"
  wc -c < "$file"
}
EOF

source /lib/utils.sh

printf 'hello world\n' | to_upper
count_lines /data/sample.txt
file_size /data/sample.txt

tool_outputs.stderr: ls: option(s) not yet implemented in bashkit: directory

tool_outputs.commands:
set -e
printf 'HOME=%s\n' "$HOME"
for p in / /lib /data /home /home/eval /home/user; do
  if [[ -e "$p" ]]; then echo "EXISTS $p"; else echo "MISSING $p"; fi
done
tool_outputs.stdout:
HOME=/home/eval
EXISTS /
MISSING /lib
EXISTS /data
EXISTS /home
MISSING /home/eval
EXISTS /home/user

tool_outputs.commands:
set -e
if [[ -f /data/sample.txt ]]; then echo 'sample exists'; wc -l < /data/sample.txt; wc -c < /data/sample.txt; else echo 'sample missing'; fi
